title: THE TRIAL PROCEDURE ON THE BASIS OF SAMPLING ADMINISTRATION IN THE CRIMINAL PROCEEDINGS. COMPREHENSIVE RIGHT ASPECTS
author: Țoncu S.
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description: We believe that in order to maximally exclude the possibility of "taking over" the practice of a country and, moreover, of a different legal system, thus avoiding a great danger of also taking over certain stereotypes or misperceiving these practices, the working group, u researched numerous foreign normative acts regarding the simplified procedure in question, to which we will refer in the following lines. In the same way, we will relate the context in which this institution appeared and exists, as well as the way in which it was regulated and adapted by each country for its needs.

In the same way, we will relate the context in which this institution appeared and exists, as well as the way in which it was regulated and adapted by each country for its needs.
keywords: amendment, legislation, criminal procedure, judicial investigation
